headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on NXP Semiconductors, Lowers Price Target to $290
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $305 to $290.
